name: icdt-skills
description: Depth pack for ICDT (International Conference on Database Theory): PODS-vs-ICDT routing, the two-round LIPIcs calendar with a first-cycle revision, anonymous CMT submission, complete-proofs full-version rigor, and lipics-v2021 camera-ready production.

plugins.name: icdt-skills
plugins.description: Twelve ICDT-specific skills for the International Conference on Database Theory, its EDBT co-location, and its open-access LIPIcs publication model, grounded in the ICDT 2026/2027 databasetheory.org calls, the EDBT/ICDT 2026 and 2027 sites, DROPS/Schloss Dagstuhl, and dblp.
